id.description: The unique identifier for the transit gateway peering attachment.

peer_account_id.description: The AWS account ID of the peer.

peer_region.description: The AWS region of the peer transit gateway.

peer_transit_gateway_id.description: The ID of the peer transit gateway.

state.description: The current state of the transit gateway peering attachment.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the transit gateway peering attachment.

transit_gateway_id.description: The ID of the local transit gateway.
